ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tweet was posted */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location mentioned in the tweet */,
  "tweet_content" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet has received */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of any user mentioned in the tweet */,
  "source_device" TEXT /* Device or application used to post the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user on Twitter */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined Twitter */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio of the user */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is verified on Twitter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the tattoo artist */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty or style of the artist */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the artist started working at the studio */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the artist based on customer feedback */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the artist has received */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's social media profile */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Text indicating the artist's availability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score indicating the positivity or negativity of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label describing the sentiment as positive, negative, or neutral */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the mention */,
  "mentioned_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist or studio mentioned */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of the mention (e.g., artist, studio) */,
  "mention_text" TEXT /* Text of the mention */,
  "mention_context" TEXT /* Context of the mention (e.g., praise, criticism) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_mentioned_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_metric" TEXT /* Target metric for the campaign (e.g., engagement, conversions) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., promotion, awareness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that was engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who engaged */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, retweet, reply) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating provided by the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)
